pred_answer: README 里说 Vortex 支持的 backend drivers 包括：C++ simulator（simx）、RTL simulator、physical Xilinx FPGA、physical Altera FPGA；并说明默认 driver 是 SimX。引用：repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:3, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:58。

evidence.text: Vortex is a full-stack open-source RISC-V GPGPU. Vortex supports multiple **backend drivers**, including our C++ simulator (simx), an RTL simulator, and physical Xilinx and Altera FPGAs-- all controlled by a single driver script. The chosen driver determines the corresponding code invoked to run Vortex. Generally, developers will prototype their intended design in simx, before completing going forward with an RTL implementation. Alternatively, you can get up and running by selecting a driver of your choice and running a demo program.

If you are interested in a stable release of Vortex, you can download the latest release [here](https://github.com/vortexgpgpu/vortex/releases/latest). Otherwise, you can pull the most recent, but (potentially) unstable version as shown below. The following steps demonstrate how to build and run Vortex with the default driver: SimX. If you are interested in a different backend, look [here](docs/simulation.md).

pred_answer: 是。`vx_dev_open()` 读取 `getenv("VORTEX_DRIVER")`，如果没设置就把 `driverName` 设成 `"simx"`，再拼出 `libvortex-simx.so` 并 `dlopen`，所以默认 runtime driver 是 simx（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:58-66）。`ci/blackbox.sh` 的默认脚本参数也把 `DRIVER` 初始化为 `simx`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:43-45）。

PROJECT := libvortex-simx.so

.PHONY: all force driver clean-driver clean-runtime clean

all: $(DESTDIR)/$(PROJECT)

driver: $(DESTDIR)/libsimx.so

$(DESTDIR)/libsimx.so: force
	DESTDIR=$(DESTDIR) $(MAKE) -C $(ROOT_DIR)/sim/simx $(DESTDIR)/libsimx.so

$(DESTDIR)/$(PROJECT): $(SRCS) $(DESTDIR)/libsimx.so $(CONFIG_FILE)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) $(SRCS) $(LDFLAGS) -o $@

DEFAULTS() {
    DRIVER=simx
    APP=sgemm
    DEBUG=0
    DEBUG_LEVEL=0
    SCOPE=0
    HAS_ARGS=0
    HAS_NP=0
    PERF_CLASS=0
    CONFIGS="$CONFIGS"
    TEMPBUILD=0
    LOGFILE=run.log
}

parse_args() {
    DEFAULTS
    for i in "$@"; do
        case $i in
            --driver=*) DRIVER=${i#*=} ;;

pred_answer: `vx_dev_open` 先读环境变量 `VORTEX_DRIVER`，为空则默认用 `simx`；然后把名字拼成 `libvortex-<driver>.so` 并用 `dlopen(..., RTLD_LAZY)` 动态加载，例如 `VORTEX_DRIVER=rtlsim` 会找 `libvortex-rtlsim.so`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:60, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:65, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:66）。加载成功后，它用 `dlsym` 找共享库里的 `vx_dev_init`，调用它填充全局 `g_callbacks`，随后通过 `g_callbacks.dev_open` 真正打开设备，并做 DCR 初始化；关闭时再 `dlclose(g_drv_handle)`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:72, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:80, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:86, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:90, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/stub/vortex.cpp:102）。各 driver 库通过包含 `callbacks.inc` 导出同名 `vx_dev_init`，其中 `dev_open` 会创建该 driver 自己的 `vx_device` 并调用 `device->init()`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/common/callbacks.inc:20, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/common/callbacks.inc:24, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/common/callbacks.inc:27, repo_sources/vortex/vortex/runtime/common/callbacks.inc:30）。

pred_answer: README 快速跑 vecadd 的命令顺序是：`git clone --depth=1 --recursive https://github.com/vortexgpgpu/vortex.git`，`cd vortex`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:75）；`sudo ./ci/install_dependencies.sh`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:80）；`mkdir build`、`cd build`，然后按位宽执行 `../configure --xlen=32 --tooldir=$HOME/tools` 或 `../configure --xlen=64 --tooldir=$HOME/tools`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:85）；`./ci/toolchain_install.sh --all`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:94）；`source ./ci/toolchain_env.sh`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:98）；`make -s`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:102）；最后运行 `./ci/blackbox.sh --cores=2 --app=vecadd`（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:106）。

evidence.text:
### Building Vortex
```sh
make -s
```
### Quick demo running vecadd OpenCL kernel on 2 cores
```sh
./ci/blackbox.sh --cores=2 --app=vecadd
```

### Configure your build folder
```sh
    mkdir build
    cd build
    # for 32bit
    ../configure --xlen=32 --tooldir=$HOME/tools
    # for 64bit
    ../configure --xlen=64 --tooldir=$HOME/tools

### Install prebuilt toolchain
```sh
   ./ci/toolchain_install.sh --all
```
### set environment variables
```sh
    # should always run before using the toolchain!
    source ./ci/toolchain_env.sh

### Install Vortex codebase
```sh
	git clone --depth=1 --recursive https://github.com/vortexgpgpu/vortex.git
	cd vortex
```
### Install system dependencies
```sh
# ensure dependent libraries are present
sudo ./ci/install_dependencies.sh

pred_answer: blackbox.sh 的默认值是 driver=simx、app=sgemm：DEFAULTS() 里直接设置 DRIVER=simx、APP=sgemm（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:43-46），parse_args() 会先调用 DEFAULTS 再解析命令行覆盖项（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:57-62）。这和 README 说默认 driver 是 SimX 不冲突（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:58）；README 的 quick demo 显式传了 --app=vecadd，只是覆盖默认 app，不是在声明默认 app（repo_sources/vortex/vortex/README.md:106-108）。

pred_answer: 把 `CONFIGS` 当环境变量放在 `blackbox.sh` 命令前面，多个宏写在同一个引号里，每个用 `-D`：`CONFIGS="-DDCACHE_SIZE=<bytes> -DL2_CACHE_SIZE=<bytes> -DL3_CACHE_SIZE=<bytes>" ./ci/blackbox.sh --driver=simx ...`。cache size 单位是 bytes；仓库示例也是这样传 `DCACHE_SIZE/L2_CACHE_SIZE/L3_CACHE_SIZE`。如果要启用 L2/L3 层，再加 blackbox 参数 `--l2cache --l3cache`，脚本会追加 `-DL2_ENABLE/-DL3_ENABLE`。证据：`repo_sources/vortex/vortex/docs/simulation.md:36`, `repo_sources/vortex/vortex/docs/simulation.md:51`, `repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:52`, `repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:67`, `repo_sources/vortex/vortex/ci/blackbox.sh:112`。

evidence.text:
36 By default, Vortex uses fixed cache sizes (L1 = 16KB, L2 = 1MB, L3 = 2MB).
37 You can override these values at build time using the `CONFIGS` environment variable with `-D` flags:
41 | L1 Data     | `DCACHE_SIZE` | 16384 | `-DDCACHE_SIZE=16384` |
43 | L2 Cache    | `L2_CACHE_SIZE` | 1048576 | `-DL2_CACHE_SIZE=1048576` |
44 | L3 Cache    | `L3_CACHE_SIZE` | 2097152 | `-DL3_CACHE_SIZE=2097152` |
46 **Note:** All sizes must be specified in **bytes**
51 $ CONFIGS="-DDCACHE_SIZE=16384 -DL2_CACHE_SIZE=1048576 -DL3_CACHE_SIZE=2097152" \
52 ./ci/blackbox.sh --driver=simx --clusters=1 --cores=4 --warps=4 --threads=4 --args="path-to-test-file"

107 build_driver() {
108     local cmd_opts=""

113     cmd_opts=$(add_option "$cmd_opts" "make -C $DRIVER_PATH > /dev/null")
114     echo "Running: $cmd_opts"
115     eval "$cmd_opts"
